mapper.sql: SELECT T.ID, T.TRUST_ID, T.PLAN_DATE, T.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, T.LOAD_UNLOAD, T.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, T.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, T.LOAD_NUM, T.MORN_WORK_NUM, T.NIGHT_WORK_NUM, T.RESIDUE_NUM, T.BERTHING_TIME_PLAN, T.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN, T.STARTTIME_PLAN, T.ENDTIME_PLAN, T.MOVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN, T.MOVE_IN_BERTH_ID, T.MOVE_IN_BERTH_NAME, T.BERTH_ID, T.BERTH_NAME, T.CREATE_BY, T.CREATE_BY_NAME, T.CREATE_TIME, T.UPDATE_BY, T.UPDATE_BY_NAME, T.UPDATE_TIME, CONCAT(CONCAT(S.SHIP_NAME, '_'), F.VOYAGE) AS SHIPVOYAGE_LABEL, S.SCN FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DAYNIGTTPLAN T INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE S ON T.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = S.ID INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM F ON F.ID = T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID where TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{planDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T.BERTH_NAME
mapper.select: SELECT CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_NUM FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId}
SELECT SUM(RESIDUE_NUM) AS total FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DAYNIGTTPLAN WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId} AND TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{planDate} GROUP BY SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID

SELECT T.ID, T.TRUST_ID, T.PLAN_DATE, T.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, T.LOAD_UNLOAD, T.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, T.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, T.LOAD_NUM, T.MORN_WORK_NUM, T.NIGHT_WORK_NUM, T.RESIDUE_NUM, T.BERTHING_TIME_PLAN, T.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN, T.STARTTIME_PLAN, T.ENDTIME_PLAN, T.MOVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN, T.MOVE_IN_BERTH_ID, T.MOVE_IN_BERTH_NAME, T.BERTH_ID, T.BERTH_NAME, T.CREATE_BY, T.CREATE_BY_NAME, T.CREATE_TIME, T.UPDATE_BY, T.UPDATE_BY_NAME, T.UPDATE_TIME, CONCAT(CONCAT(S.SHIP_NAME, '_'), F.VOYAGE) AS SHIPVOYAGE_LABEL, S.SCN FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DAYNIGTTPLAN T INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE S ON T.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = S.ID INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM F ON F.ID = T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID where TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = to_char( to_date(#{planDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AND S.SHIP_STATUS_CODE NOT IN ('120') ORDER BY T.BERTH_NAME

SELECT T1.ID AS "shipvoyageId", T2.ID AS "value", CONCAT(CONCAT(T1.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T2.VOYAGE) as "label", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", T2.CUSTOMER_NAME as "shipAgentName", T1.START_PORT_NAME as "startPortName", T1.END_PORT_NAME as "endPortName", TO_CHAR(T1.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "arrivalTimePlan", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T2.VOYAGE as "voyage", T2.LOAD_UNLOAD as "loadUnload", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE as "cargoCategoryCode", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", CARGO_NUM as "cargoNum" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T2 ON T1.ID = T2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE T1.SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('20','30','50','60', '70','80','90','100','110') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(T1.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, 'YYYY-MM-DD') DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_SHIP_DAYNIGTTPLAN(ID, TRUST_ID, PLAN_DATE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, LOAD_NUM, MORN_WORK_NUM, NIGHT_WORK_NUM, RESIDUE_NUM, BERTHING_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN, STARTTIME_PLAN, ENDTIME_PLAN, MOVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN, MOVE_IN_BERTH_ID, MOVE_IN_BERTH_NAME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loadUnload, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loadNum, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{mornWorkNum, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nightWorkNum, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{residueNum, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{berthingTimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{leaveBerthTimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{starttimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endtimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{moveBerthTimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{moveInBerthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{moveInBerthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
